results.name: panorama
results.description: All the panoramas in Magic history.

results.name: panorama-ice-age-plains
results.description: Christopher Rush's Plains panorama from Ice Age. Start with the Snow land on the left.

results.name: panorama-magicfest-lands
results.description: The MagicFest 2019 land panorama, visible when in WUBRG order. See: https://twitter.com/SamBurleyArt/status/1091394627288985600

results.name: panorama-mh1-lands
results.description: The vertical panorama from Modern Horizons 1: each land has the next one visible in its background. See Titus's description on Twitter: https://twitter.com/TitusLunter/status/1130213022323150848
